summary: Frontend testing of real-time UI update after document upload. Verified: 1) Polling interval is 2000ms (2 seconds) in both Dashboard.js and CaseDetail.js, 2) Re-analyzing banner (data-testid='reanalyzing-banner') shows when case has score > 0 AND status = analyzing, 3) Full analyzing spinner shows only when score = 0 AND status = analyzing, 4) Toast notification (data-testid='analysis-toast') auto-dismisses after 5000ms (5 seconds), 5) onUploadComplete callback forces local state to 'analyzing' immediately for instant polling.

1_dashboard_renders_correctly.evidence: Dashboard page found with data-testid='dashboard-page', left sidebar, right panel, 29 case items

4_reanalyzing_banner_dashboard.evidence: Dashboard.js line 541-552: Shows when isAnalyzing && score > 0, has data-testid='reanalyzing-banner'

5_reanalyzing_banner_casedetail.evidence: CaseDetail.js line 344-355: Shows when sc.status === 'analyzing' && score > 0, has data-testid='reanalyzing-banner'

6_full_spinner_dashboard.evidence: Dashboard.js line 523-537: Shows when isAnalyzing && score === 0

7_full_spinner_casedetail.evidence: CaseDetail.js line 335-340: Shows when sc.status === 'analyzing' && score === 0

12_onuploadcomplete_dashboard.evidence: Dashboard.js lines 843-849: Sets prevSelectedStatusRef.current = 'analyzing', updates local state, calls fetchCases()

13_onuploadcomplete_casedetail.evidence: CaseDetail.js lines 649-655: Sets prevStatusRef.current = 'analyzing', updates local state, calls fetchData()

14_add_document_modal_dashboard.evidence: Modal opens with data-testid='add-document-modal', has upload drop zone, context input, analyze button

15_add_document_modal_casedetail.evidence: Modal opens on CaseDetail page with same functionality

code_review_verification.polling_interval: VERIFIED - 2000ms (not 5000ms) in both Dashboard.js (line 254) and CaseDetail.js (line 169)
code_review_verification.toast_auto_dismiss: VERIFIED - 5000ms (5 seconds) in both files via setTimeout
code_review_verification.status_tracking: VERIFIED - prevSelectedStatusRef (Dashboard) and prevStatusRef (CaseDetail) track analyzing→active transition
code_review_verification.reanalyzing_banner_condition: VERIFIED - Shows when status='analyzing' AND score > 0
code_review_verification.full_spinner_condition: VERIFIED - Shows when status='analyzing' AND score === 0
code_review_verification.onuploadcomplete_forces_analyzing: VERIFIED - Both pages set local state to 'analyzing' immediately after upload

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js polling uses setInterval via useEffect (line 251-256), correctly clears interval on cleanup
CaseDetail.js polling uses setInterval via useEffect (line 167-172), correctly clears interval on cleanup
Both pages use useRef to track previous status for detecting analyzing→active transition
Toast notification uses CSS animation 'slideUp' for smooth appearance
onUploadComplete callback correctly forces local state to 'analyzing' for immediate polling
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded data with 29 cases
context_for_next_testing_agent: Real-time UI update after document upload is fully implemented. Polling interval is 2000ms (2 seconds). Re-analyzing banner shows when case has existing data (score > 0) and is being re-analyzed. Full spinner shows only for new cases (score = 0). Toast notification appears for 5 seconds when analysis completes (analyzing→active transition). onUploadComplete forces local state to 'analyzing' immediately for instant polling.
screenshots: .screenshots/add_document_modal.png - Add Document Modal with drop zone and context input
.screenshots/case_detail_page.png - Case Detail page with risk score and findings
.screenshots/case_detail_add_doc_modal.png - Add Document Modal on Case Detail page
